named_6star.label: Atributo nombrado 6★ (Str/Agi/Int/Will)
named_6star.confirmed: Int, Agi y Will = tabla completa 1-9 confirmada por screenshots (misma progresion, max 156). Str se asume igual (mismo maximo).

main_6star.label: Main Attribute 6★ (esencia generica que aplica al atributo primario del operador)
main_6star.confirmed: Tabla completa 1-9 confirmada por screenshot (max 132 — MENOR que el atributo nombrado, que llega a 156).

conditional.name: Wolven Blood
conditional.trigger: tras infligir Critical DMG con una skill; 1 stack, max 16

skill.name: Suppression: Emergency Boost
skill.base: When the wielder's battle skill hits the enemy, the wielder gains ATK +12.0% for 20s. Effects of the same name cannot stack.

skill.name: Combative: Amaranthine Cleave
skill.base: Physical DMG Dealt +16.0%. When the wielder applies Physical Susceptibility, the wielder gains Arts Intensity +30 for 20s. When the wielder applies Crush, the wielder gains Physical DMG Dealt +[9.0% + (3.0% × Max number of Vulnerability stacks consumed from one enemy)] for 30s. The two effects apply separately and do not stack with themselves.

skill.name: Brutality: Lands of Yore
skill.base: Arts Intensity +10. After the wielder consumes Vulnerable stack(s), the wielder gains Physical DMG Dealt +[5.0%×Stacks Consumed] for 20s. Effects of the same name cannot stack.

skill.name: Fracture: Artzy Exaggeration
skill.base: Cryo DMG Dealt +16.0%. After the wielder scores a critical hit with a battle skill, the wielder gains Cryo DMG Dealt +14.0% for 30s. Max stacks for effects of the same name: 3. Duration of each stack is counted separately. Effect only triggers once every 0.1s.

skill.name: Twilight: Imposing Peak
skill.base: Ultimate DMG Dealt +16%. After the wielder applies Lifted, during the next ultimate cast within 30s, the wielder gains Physical DMG Dealt +12%. Max stacks for effects of the same name: 3. Duration of each stack is counted separately. Effect only triggers once every 0.5s.

skill.name: Efficacy: Fuel for the Torch
skill.base: Heat DMG Dealt +7%. When the wielder's skill applies Heat Infliction, the wielder gains Physical and Heat DMG Dealt +8% for 20.00s. When the wielder's skill applies Heat Susceptibility, the entire team gains Physical and Heat DMG Dealt +4% for 30.00s. The two effects apply separately and do not stack with themselves.

skill.name: Detonate: Brigand's Bane
skill.base: Cryo DMG Dealt +16.0%. When the wielder applies Cryo Infliction via battle skills or ultimates, the wielder gains Cryo DMG Dealt +20.0% for 20s. When the wielder's battle skill or ultimate applies Arts Susceptibility, the target enemy suffers Arts DMG Taken +6.0% for 20s. The two effects apply separately and do not stack with themselves.

skill.name: Brutality: Cemented Fury
skill.base: Critical Rate +3.0%. When the wielder applies Vulnerable to an enemy with no Vulnerable stacks, the wielder gains ATK +15.0% for 15s. Effects of the same name cannot stack.

skill.name: Medicant: Blight Fervor
skill.base: Treatment Efficiency +10.0%. After the wielder gives HP treatment with their own skill, the entire team gains ATK +9.0% for 15s. Effects of the same name cannot stack.

skill.name: Infliction: Vicious Purge
skill.base: Arts Damage +12%. After the wielder consumes an Arts Reaction, target enemy suffers Arts DMG Taken +10% (for the specified element) for 15s. Effect only triggers once every 25s.

skill.name: Suppression: Concentric Circles
skill.base: Combo Skill DMG Dealt +10.0%. When the wielder casts a combo skill, during the next battle skill cast within 30s, the wielder gains Electric DMG Dealt +10.0%. Max stacks for effects of the same name: 3. Duration of each stack is counted separately.

skill.name: Assault: Armament Prep
skill.base: ATK +12

skill.name: Pursuit: Duty Fulfilled
skill.base: Nature DMG Dealt +16.0%. After the wielder's combo skill applies Lifted, the team gains Arts DMG Dealt +12.0% for 15s. For every enemy Lifted, the team gains bonus Arts DMG Dealt +3.5%, up to a max of +10.5%. Effects of the same name cannot stack.

skill.name: Detonate: Imposing Champion
skill.base: Secondary Attribute +10%. After the wielder applies an Arts Burst, target enemy suffers Arts DMG Taken +9% for 15.00s. Effects of the same name cannot stack.

skill.name: Infliction: Tidal Murmurs
skill.base: Secondary attribute +16.0%. After the wielder consumes Corrosion, target enemy suffers Arts DMG Taken +10.0% for 25s. Effects of the same name cannot stack.

skill.name: Brutality: Disciplinarian
skill.base: ATK +10%. After the wielder consumes Vulnerability stack(s), the wielder gains ATK +[5% + 2.5%×Stacks Consumed] while other operators in the team gain half of this buff for 20s. Effects of the same name cannot stack.

skill.name: Suppression: Stacked Hew
skill.base: Physical DMG Dealt +10.0%. When the wielder's battle skill or ultimate hits the enemy, the wielder gains Physical DMG Dealt +10.0% for 30s. Max stacks for effects of the same name: 3. Duration of each stack is counted separately. Effect only triggers once every 0.1s.

skill.name: Suppression: Fin Chaser's Intent
skill.base: ATK +5.0%. When the wielder's battle skill applies Solidification, target enemy suffers Cryo DMG Taken +7.0% for 15s. Effects of the same name cannot stack.

skill.name: Medicant: Glory of Knighthood
skill.base: Secondary Attribute +5.0%. Combo skill HP treatment effect +20.0%.

skill.name: Efficacy: Overlapping Flickers
skill.base: ATK +7.0%. When the wielder gains Electric Amp, the wielder also gains Electric DMG Dealt +5.5% for 30s. Max stacks for effects of the same name: 3. Duration of each stack is counted separately. This effect only triggers once every 0.1s.

skill.name: Suppression: Emergency Boost
skill.base: When the wielder's battle skill hits the enemy, the wielder gains ATK +12% for 20s. Effects of the same name cannot stack.

skill.name: Twilight: Blazing Wail
skill.base: Heat DMG Dealt +16.0%. After the wielder casts an ultimate, the wielder gains Basic Attack DMG Dealt +75.0% for 20s. Effects of the same name cannot stack.

skill.name: Efficacy: Mincing Therapy
skill.base: Treatment Efficiency +10.0% When a Protected operator takes DMG, the wielder restores the said operator's HP by [84 + Willx0.70] Effect only triggers once every 15s.

skill.name: Inspiring: Back to the Broken City
skill.base: ATK +5%. Arts Intensity +25.

skill.name: Medicant: Redemption of Faith
skill.base: Main Attribute +5.0%. When the wielder's battle skill provides HP treatment, the controlled operator is restored for another [60 + Will×0.5] HP. Effect only triggers once every 15s.

skill.name: Twilight: Lingering Glow
skill.base: ATK +7.0%. When the wielder's skill applies Vulnerability, during the next ultimate cast within 30s, the wielder gains DMG Dealt +12.0%. Max stacks for effects of the same name: 3. Duration of each stack is counted separately. Effect is only triggered once every 0.5s.

skill.name: Infliction: Long Time Wish
skill.base: Arts Intensity +30. When the wielder applies Originium Crystals or Solidification, during the next battle skill or ultimate cast within 20s, the wielder gains Physical DMG Dealt +36.0%. Effects of the same name cannot stack.

skill.name: Suppression: Olden Moon
skill.base: ATK +7.0%. For 20s after the wielder casts a combo skill, the wielder's next battle skill gains Cryo and Nature DMG Dealt +8.0%. Max stacks for effects of the same name: 2. Duration of each stack is counted separately.

skill.name: Suppression: Emergency Boost
skill.base: When the wielder's battle skill hits the enemy, the wielder gains ATK +12.0% for 20s. Effects of the same name cannot stack.

skill.name: Suppression: Emergency Boost
skill.base: When the wielder's battle skill hits the enemy, the wielder gains ATK +12.0% for 20s. Effects of the same name cannot stack.

skill.name: Suppression: Astrophysics
skill.base: Arts DMG Dealt +12.0%. When the wielder casts a battle skill, the wielder gains Arts DMG Dealt +12.0% for 15s. When the wielder casts a combo skill, Arts DMG Dealt +12.0% for 15s. The two effects apply separately and do not stack with themselves.

skill.name: Assault: Armament Prep
skill.base: ATK +12

skill.name: Detonate: Bonechilling
skill.base: Skill DMG Dealt +20.0% (for every skill). When the wielder's battle skill applies Cryo Infliction, the wielder gains Cryo DMG Dealt +10.0% for 15s. When the wielder deals combo skill DMG to an enemy with Cryo Infliction, the wielder gains Cryo DMG Dealt +20.0% for 15s. The two effects apply separately and do not stack with themselves.

skill.name: Suppression: Streaming Blitz
skill.base: Electric DMG Dealt +16.0%. When the wielder's battle skill consumes Arts Reactions, the wielder gains Battle Skill Electric DMG Dealt +20.0% for 20s. This effect can reach a max of 2 stacks and can only trigger once every 0.1s. Duration of each stack is counted separately. After the wielder casts an ultimate, the wielder gains Battle Skill Electric DMG Dealt +40.0% for 25s. This effect cannot stack.

skill.name: Pursuit: Unending Cycle
skill.base: When the wielder casts a combo skill, the wielder gains ATK +12.0% for 20s. Effects of the same name cannot stack.

skill.name: Fracture: Gnashing Wolves
skill.base: ATK +16%. After the wielder's skill deals Critical DMG, the wielder gains 1 stack of Wolven Blood that grants Physical and Heat DMG Dealt +1%. Wolven Blood can reach 16 stacks. After reaching 16 stacks, the wielder gains another Physical and Heat DMG Dealt +24% for 20s. After the duration ends, all Wolven Blood stacks are removed.

skill.name: Inspiring: Mortise-and-Tenon Analysis
skill.base: Main Attribute +5.0%. Arts Intensity +25.

skill.name: Efficacy: Weight of Mountain
skill.base: Against Vulnerable enemies, the wielder gains DMG Dealt +20%. When the wielder's battle skill applies Vulnerability, the wielder gains All Attributes +8% for 15s. When the wielder's battle skill applies Physical Susceptibility, the wielder gains all attributes +8% for 15s. The two effects apply separately and do not stack with themselves.

skill.name: Infliction: Lone and Distant Sail
skill.base: Critical Rate +3.5%. When Solidification or Corrosion is applied to enemies, the wielder gains Cryo DMG Dealt and Nature DMG Dealt +3.5%, and Critical Rate +2.0% for 15s. If this effect is triggered by the wielder, double the increase gained. Effects of the same name cannot stack.

skill.name: Flow: Reincarnation
skill.base: Physical DMG Dealt +16.0%. After the wielder recovers SP with their own skills, the wielder gains Physical DMG Dealt +5.0% while other operators in the team gain Physical DMG Dealt +2.5% for 30s. Max stacks for effects of the same name: 5. Duration of each stack is counted separately. Effect only triggers once every 0.1s.

skill.name: Pursuit: Transcendent Arts
skill.base: Max HP +10.0%. When the wielder's combo skill applies Arts Burst or Physical Status, the entire team gains Heat DMG Dealt and Electric DMG Dealt +8.0% for 15s. Effects of the same name cannot stack.

skill.name: Flow: Unbridled Edge
skill.base: Secondary Attribute +5.0%. After the wielder's skill recovers SP, the entire team gains Heat DMG Dealt and Electric DMG Dealt +3.0% for 20s. Max stacks for effects of the same name: 3. Duration of each stack is counted separately.

skill.name: Efficacy: Tenacious Will
skill.base: Secondary Attribute +5.0%. After the wielder applies Knocked Down or Weakened, DEF +18.0% for 15s. Effects of the same name cannot stack.

skill.name: Infliction: Conquest of Icy Peaks
skill.base: To enemies with Cryo Infliction or Solidification, the wielder gains DMG Dealt +8.0%. After consuming Solidification, ATK +12.0% for 15s. Effects of the same name cannot stack.

For every enemy suffering from Nature Infliction applied by the said battle skill, the team gains bonus Arts DMG Dealt +2.0%, up to a max of +6.0%. Effects of the same name cannot stack.

skill.base: Battle skills and ultimates gain Physical DMG Dealt +15.0%. Against Staggered enemies, battle skills and ultimates also gain DMG Dealt +50.0%.

skill.name: Detonate: Seeker of the Esoteric
skill.base: Main Attribute +5.0%. After the wielder applies an Arts Burst, ATK +6.0% for 30s. Max stacks for effects of the same name: 3. Duration of each stack is counted separately. Effect only triggers once every 0.1s.

skill.base: Max HP +10.0%. After the wielder casts an ultimate, operators whose elements differ from the wielder gain ATK +8.0% for 20s. Effects of the same name cannot stack.

skill.base: When the wielder performs a Final Strike on the enemy, the wielder gains ATK +10.0% for 8s. If the wielder is also the controlled operator, double the ATK increase gained and buff the Final Strike so that it deals Stagger +12.0% to the enemy. Effects of the same name cannot stack.

skill.base: ATK +5.0%. When the wielder deals a Physical Status, the wielder gains ATK +7.5% for 20s. Max stacks for effects of the same name: 2. Duration of each stack is counted separately. Effect only triggers once every 0.1s.

skill.base: Shield applied +24%. After the wielder's combo skill provides HP treatment, grant the controlled operator an additional [7%×Wielder's Max HP] Shield for 15s. Effect only triggers once every 15s.

skill.name: Infliction: Covetous Buildup
skill.base: ATK +7.0%. Whenever Combustion or Corrosion is applied to an enemy, the wielder gains Heat and Nature DMG Dealt +8.0% for 20s. Max stacks for effects of the same name: 2. Duration of each stack is counted separately. Effect only triggers once every 0.1s.
